result.stdout:
Description:
  ImageGenTool - Generate images using Google Gemini API

Usage:
  ImageGenTool [options]

Options:
  -p, --prompt <prompt> (REQUIRED)  The text prompt to generate an image from
  -o, --output <output> (REQUIRED)  The output path where the generated image will be saved
  -k, --api-key <api-key>           Your Google Gemini API key for image generation. If not provided, will use GEMINI_API_KEY environment variable
  -s, --size <size>                 Image dimensions in WIDTHxHEIGHT format (e.g., 1024x1024, 512x768). Default is 1024x1024 [default: 1024x1024]
  --version                         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information
